title: S10E04: Al-Qarawiyyin — manuscript confirmed, Ahmad's handwriting, 12-7-3 countdown
body: --findings Camera Op accesses Ahmad ibn Yusuf manuscripts at al-Qarawiyyin (Fez). Tyler confirms handwriting from photographs. Text stops at 'and yet.' Tyler: 'I was going further for Ahmad. I did not know that until this moment.' CAVE-001 Day 3: sequence 12-7-3 (days before Marrakech). Council reclassifies archive as directed teleological project. Footnote #100. Build 0106.
